---

Use this as a quick reference each time you build and deploy a new funnel.
Create Compelling Headline
Add All Desired Elements
Customize Font and Design
Customize Pop-Up (optional)
Add Footer with Contact Info
DETAILS:
Optimize for Mobile Devices
Test Every Funnel Step
Check Button Functionality
Confirm Data is Captured
Confirm Cards Processing
Check Follow Up Emails
Run A/B Split Test (optional)
TESTING:
Decide Which Type of Funnel to Build
Sketch Out Flow of Pages
Sketch Out Follow Up Emails
PLANNING:
Create New Sales Funnel
Set Up Custom Domain
Add All Needed Funnel Steps
Connect to Email or CRM (Optional)
Connect Payment (if needed)
Set up Products (if needed)
Set Up Follow Up Emails
Add Opt-In Forms (if needed)
Add Calendar Widget (if needed)
Add Order Forms (if needed)
Add Bumps or Upsells (if needed)
SETUP:
FUNNEL CREATION CHECKLIST
When complete… launch your funnel!
